en.red_wine_esp_bottle-description: The red wines of Spain are a symphony of southern aromas: notes of ripe cherries, blackberries, plums, spices, leather and oak. Allow yourself to enjoy the depth and passion of the drinks born under the Spanish sun.
en.red_wine_arg_bottle-description: The red wines of Argentina will enchant you with their depth and harmony: from the elegant pinot noir from Patagonia to the powerful malbec from Mendoza. Every sip is a journey into the heart of the vineyards at the foot of the Andes.
en.red_wine_chile_bottle-description: The red wines of Chile will enchant you with their depth and balance. Every sip is a journey to the foot of the Andes.
en.red_wine_nz_bottle-description: The exquisite Pinot noir of New Zealand is a harmony of nature and the skill of winemakers. The elegant structure, subtle mineral notes and long aftertaste make these wines the perfect choice for special moments.
en.white_wine_fr_bottle-description: French white wine is like a watercolor landscape: light, transparent, fascinating. Imagine the vineyards of Chablis in the morning mist or the slopes of Alsace in the sunset light — all this is in a glass.
en.white_wine_it_bottle-description: The epitome of the winemakers' craftsmanship and the richness of the Mediterranean terroir. The subtle acidity, complex aromatic palette and long aftertaste make these drinks worthy of the most exquisite gastronomic combinations.
en.white_wine_austria_bottle-description: Riesling from Austria is characterized by high acidity, citrus and green fruit notes, complemented by mineral shades. Yeast exposure and careful control of the fermentation temperature emphasize the purity of the variety.
en.white_wine_esp_bottle-description: The white wines of Spain will enchant you with harmony and depth: from the freshness of albarinho to the elegance of Verdejo and the complexity of aged macabeo. Every sip is a journey through sunny vineyards by the Atlantic and into the heart of La‑Manchee.
en.white_wine_chile_bottle-description: Chilean Chardonnay embodies the best traditions of the New World and the unique terroir of the Central Valley. Vineyards located between the Andes Mountains and the Pacific Ocean produce a wine with a bright fruity character and balanced acidity.
en.white_wine_nz_bottle-description: New Zealand's white wines embody the purity of the terroir and the craftsmanship of the winemakers. Sauvignon blanc will enchant with its piercing freshness, and pinot gris with its complex aromatics and silky texture. Every sip is a journey to the shores of the Pacific Ocean.
en.wine-brane: An incredible wine that has been recognized by many renowned wine critics as one of the best and even the best wine of the estate. The vintage blend is made up of grapes that were harvested from September 22 to October 17, as well as a tiny fraction of the Carmenere variety, harvested three days after the main varieties. The wine was aged for 18 months in oak barrels (75% new, 25% annual).
en.region-brane: France. Bordeaux. Margaux Grand Cru Classé
en.grape-brane: cabernet sauvignon, cabernet franc, merlot, carmenere
en.wine-magnol: A juicy, lively and elegant dry red wine created by oenologist Bernard Fulla, who sought to extract maximum flavor from grapes in order to present a wine worthy of its name — powerful, reliable, well-structured.
en.wine-la_gorce: Two grape varieties are used to produce this exquisite wine, each making its own unique contribution to the formation of a unique drink: Cabernet Sauvignon gives the taste charm and durability, Merlot fills the wine with fruity juiciness and elasticity.
en.wine-saint_martin: The wine is characterized by a ruby color, a mild fruity taste with notes of plum and cherry, medium tannins and a spicy aftertaste. This is a classic democratic wine, suitable for grilled meat.
en.wine-meysonniers_red: Grapes for making wine are harvested from vines at least 25 years old, growing on the southern slopes of the Hermitage. Aging lasts about 12 months: 90% of the wine matures in concrete, which allows you to emphasize freshness, minerality and pure fruitiness, and the remaining 10% spend time in oak barrels, giving the wine structure, depth and subtle woody tones.
en.wine-castan: An elegant, rich wine with a deep ruby color. It has a complex aroma of berries, spices and violets. The wine tastes full-bodied with silky tannins and a persistent spicy aftertaste.
en.wine-sassicaia: The wine got its name due to the rocky soils of the vineyards with Cabernet Sauvignon. The vineyards of the farm, located at an altitude of 80-300 meters above sea level, are influenced by the marine climate and the surrounding hills, which protect them from the wind. The wine is aged for 24 months in French oak barrels, a third of which are new.
en.wine-astuto: The magnificent Astuto wine style is the result of the extensive experience of Barone Ricasoli and the fertile lands of Tuscany. The wine was aged in French oak barrels for 18 months. After bottling, the wine underwent additional maturation in bottles for 10 months.
en.grape-astuto: cabernet sauvignon, cabernet franc, merlot, petit verdot
en.wine-pater: A fine wine from «The classics. The modern» line. On the labels of the wines of this line, Frescobaldi company placed its family coat of arms, created back in the 15th century by the artist Ghirlandaio. This coat of arms expresses the unity of tradition and innovation.
en.wine-librante: This is a rich, elegant dry red wine with an intense ruby color. The aroma is dominated by ripe red fruits (plum, cherry), figs, cocoa notes, sweet spices, vanilla and tobacco. The taste is deep, warm with soft tannins and long lasting.
en.region-librante: Italy. Puglia. Primitivo di Manduria D.O.P.
en.wine-inici: This is a dry red Spanish wine, characterized by a rich dark cherry color, the aroma of red berries with nuances of anise. It has a fresh, balanced taste with soft tannins, notes of fruit, vanilla and a long, elegant aftertaste, aged for 12 months in French oak.
en.wine-beronia: It shows a magnificent young, fruity taste, marked by lively tannins and subtle hints of tobacco. The complex, rich aroma is revealed by notes of berries mixed with seasoned tones of spices.
en.wine-trapiche_red: Dry wine from the Malbec variety grown in vineyards in the upper reaches of the Mendoza River, in the eastern part of the region of the same name. This arrangement gives the wine a clean, expressive character and a clear varietal structure..
en.wine-pedro_carmenere: A dry wine made from the Carmenere grape variety, which is grown in the Maule Valley. This is the southernmost territory of the San Pedro Company, where warm, dry weather prevails.
en.region-pedro_carmenere: Chile. Central Valley. Valle del Maule
en.wine-pedro_castillo: It is characterized by an intense ruby color, a complex aroma with notes of ripe black berries, spices, vanilla and chocolate. The wine is medium-bodied, with soft tannins and a balanced long finish.
en.region-pedro_castillo: Chile. Central Valley. Valle del Maule
en.wine-spy_valley: Harvesting was carried out manually. The wort underwent fermentation in open vats, after which it was pressed, separated from the skin and aged in oak barrels for 11 months.
en.bouquet-spy_valley: roasted nuts, ripe plums, dried spices
en.wine-cote_de_lechet: A refined, mineral and sunny white wine, ideal for a warm evening in early autumn, when you can still feel the breath of summer, but you already want cool freshness in a glass.
en.wine-pierrelee: After careful selection, the grapes undergo cryomaceration to better preserve the flavor and minerality of the variety. Fermentation and malolactic fermentation are carried out in steel tanks. After that, the wine is aged in vats on the lees for about six months.
en.wine-meysonniers_white: It is made from grapes grown on vines aged from 20 to 40 years. The vineyards are located in the Croz-Hermitage appellation in the northern part of the Rhone Valley, on the gentle southern slopes of the hills, where the layered soil of clay, pebbles and gravel gives the berries richness and character.
en.wine-zibibbo: The wines of Sicily have always attracted a lot of attention, because the unique terroir helps the wines to open up in a special way. And the muscat grape variety, which was given the name Zibbibo, plays with a multifaceted palette of tropical fruits and gives the wine an incredible aroma and taste.
en.wine-gavi: This young, fresh, well-balanced wine is made from Cortese grapes grown on clay-sandy soils in the Gavi region. It is aged on its own yeast for 4 months.
en.wine-insolia: An attractive monosort white wine made from autochthonous Sicilian grapes of the Inzolia variety, distributed primarily in the western part of Sicily.
en.wine-rabl: Elegant, dry Austrian white wine from the Kamptal region. It has a fresh, bright taste with crisp acidity, pronounced minerality and tones of lemon, green apple and apricot.
en.wine-albarino: Bright, very fresh and lively wine, radiating the joy of life and giving smiles, is the flagship position of the winery of the same name.
en.wine-beronia_verdejo: A fresh, dry Spanish white wine from the Rueda region. It has a pale straw color. The taste is characterized by structure, high acidity and a slight bitterness in a persistent aftertaste, ideal for seafood.
en.wine-el_coto: This dry wine is made from a blend of Verdejo, Viura and Sauvignon Blanc grapes. The berries are grown on the high-altitude (840 meters above sea level) site of «Finca Carbonera», located in Rioja Alta.
en.wine-invivo: This wine for New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc lovers. Grown in Marlborough and made at our winery in Te Kauwhata in the Waikato. Lovely tropical aromas and aromatic exuberance, the palate is full-flavoured, with sweet fruit but with great crunchy acidity.
en.wine-framingham: Rich, aromatic dry white wine with a soft texture. It has aromas of red apple, pear and spices, and tastes of baked apple, pear and white peach. It is produced with a lees exposure of 5 months to create texture.
en.wine-white_castillo: A dry wine made from Chardonnay grapes from the best vineyards in the Casablanca Valley. This region feels the influence of the Pacific Ocean, which contributes to a fresh climate and, as a result, slow ripening of grapes.
en.vodka-description: Vodka would have remained a regional, Eastern European drink if in the 1920s, perhaps thanks to Russian immigrants, it had not begun to gain popularity in bohemian circles first in Paris, and then in London and New York. We store vodka in freezers at -8°C, with the exception of ultra-premium items, so that they retain an almost elusive taste.
en.spirit-grey_goose: The key feature of this five-fold purified drink is the use of spring water straight from the Cognac province in France.
en.spirit-beluga: Its main features include the use of malt, strawberry extract and molasses in the composition, as well as a unique purification through cotton filters, providing a subtle, mild taste with hints of sea breeze and a «rest» period of 45 days.
en.spirit-absolut: Produced since 1879, this vodka is distinguished by the use of exclusively natural ingredients: winter wheat and artesian water, without added sugar.
en.spirit-finlandia: It is characterized by its extraordinary softness and purity, achieved through the use of glacial water, six-row barley and continuous 50-hour distillation (more than 200 purification stages).
en.spirit-bulbash: It has a special softness, pure taste, the use of natural ingredients (malt, cranberries, truffle) and artesian water.
en.gin-description: The history of gin began in the 17th century in the Netherlands (as «genever»), and flourished in the 18th century in England. Strict quality standards (for example, a ban on adding sugar to London Dry) and centuries-old recipes guarantee the authenticity of every sip.
en.spirit-monkey: It is distinguished by the use of 47 herbal ingredients, a strength of 47%, aging in clay containers and a unique taste combining juniper, spices and lingonberries.
en.spirit-hendricks: Created in a unique production process that uses extracts of Bulgarian rose and Belgian cucumber.
en.spirit-botanist: To create this drink, 22 types of local herbs, flowers and berries are used, hand-picked, in addition to 9 classic ingredients.
en.spirit-ukiyo: It is created on the basis of distilled seti from barley (or rice) with the addition of yuzu zest, juniper and spices.
en.spirit-bombay: It is distinguished by the unique Vapour Infusion steam distillation method and the use of 10 selected herbal ingredients (botanicals).
en.spirit-gordons: One of the most popular London Dry gin varieties in the world, produced since 1769 according to an invariable secret recipe.
en.tequila-description: Tequila and mezcal are like the landscapes of Mexico: from the sunny plains of Jalisco to the mountain valleys of Oaxaca. Imagine blue agave plantations under the midday sun or mescalero earth ovens where agave cores are baked — all this magic is in the glass.
en.spirit-don_julio: Created in honor of the founding of the distillery in 1942, this tequila is distinguished by its long aging (at least 2.5 years) in bourbon barrels, golden-amber color, complex taste with notes of caramel, chocolate and oak, as well as a characteristic tall elongated bottle symbolizing agave leaves.
en.spirit-patron: It is produced in small batches by double distillation, not aged in barrels, which preserves the pure taste of agave exposed to heat in stone furnaces. It comes in individually numbered handmade bottles.
en.spirit-herencia: Made from blue agave aged from 8 to 13 years, it has a complex taste, with sweet notes of vanilla, caramel and pungent hints of cinnamon.
en.spirit-olmeca: The special features are the fresh taste with citrus and herbal notes, as well as the lack of aging, which makes it an ideal base for cocktails and use with salt and lime.
en.category-olmeca: Mixto (at least 51% distillate from blue agave)
en.spirit-contraluz: An innovative transparent mezcal that combines smoky notes of agave with softness and floral undertones. The drink is made from 100% Espadin agave, aged in oak barrels and then filtered with activated carbon to remove color, while maintaining the complexity of taste.
en.rum-description: A carefully selected collection of rums celebrates the rich heritage of cane alcohol. Feel the warmth of aged samples with notes of toffee and dried fruits, or enjoy the bright freshness of crystal clear white rum. Each bottle is a story of sunny islands and the long—term experience of master distillers.
en.spirit-matusalem: The creators of Matusalem were the first to start aging rum using the solera system — this is one of the «components» of its taste uniqueness. This ancient technique is used to produce Spanish brandy and sherry wines and involves the constant mixing of new and aged spirits.
en.spirit-dictador: Produced on the basis of sugar cane, it has a rich taste with notes of caramel, coffee, vanilla and honey, combining softness with aged woodiness.
en.spirit-havana_seven: Premium Cuban rum, characterized by a rich taste with notes of caramel, cocoa, vanilla, ripe tropical fruits and hints of tobacco.
en.spirit-havana_three: Aged for at least 3 years in white oak barrels, this rum has a light straw color, a mild taste with notes of vanilla, caramel, pear and banana, as well as smoky shades.
en.spirit-captain: Made from sugar cane molasses, it is characterized by two years of aging in bourbon oak barrels, a rich aroma with notes of vanilla, spices, caramel, dried fruits and a perfectly balanced taste.
en.spirit-bacardi: Golden rum aged in burnt oak barrels, created in Cuba in 1862. It has a mild, balanced taste with notes of vanilla, roasted almonds and banana.
en.single_malt-description: The choice of true connoisseurs who appreciate individuality and depth of taste. Each sip reveals a multi-layered bouquet of aromas: from fruity freshness to woody depth and spicy shades.
en.blended_malt-description: Noble malt whisky blends represent the art of combining tradition and modernity. They are distinguished by a refined balance and a long, memorable aftertaste.
en.american_whiskies-description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of American craftsmanship with the whiskey collection. Each sip reveals the depth of taste, honed by decades of oak aging.
en.blended_whiskies-description: Noble blends are the result of the painstaking work of the blend masters. They combine dozens of alcohols to give you an impeccable balance of flavor and aroma.
en.brandies-description: The brandy collection is the epitome of distillers' craftsmanship and the richness of terroirs. From the exquisite notes of cognac to the distinctive character of Armagnac: each drink reveals its own unique taste story.
en.spirit-macallan_18: Combining aging in American and European sherry oak barrels, it has a balanced, rich taste with notes of dried fruits, ginger, vanilla and toffee, as well as an amber color obtained without artificial dyes.
en.spirit-macallan_15: The key feature is aging in two types of barrels: American and European sherry. This ensures a harmonious taste with notes of dried fruits, vanilla, spices and citrus fruits at a strength of 43%.
en.spirit-macallan_12: Aged in a combination of American and European oak sherry barrels. The special feature is a mild, balanced taste with notes of creamy toffee, dried fruits, orange peel and spices. It has a golden amber color and a warming, long-lasting aftertaste.
en.spirit-glen_quinta: It is known for its 10-year aging in bourbon barrels and final aging in Ruby port wine barrels from various quintas. It has a deep honey-pink hue, intense taste with notes of dark mint chocolate, walnut and orange.
en.spirit-glen_nectar: An exquisite single malt whiskey that is undergoing final pre-treatment in barrels from the French dessert wine Sauternes. The special features are the sweet honey taste with notes of citrus, creme brulee, ginger and the absence of cold filtration.
en.spirit-glen_original: Known for its softness, fruity aroma and floral notes. Its key feature is the use of the tallest stills in Scotland (over 5 m), which ensures the creation of very light and refined spirits.
en.spirit-balvenie: The uniqueness lies in the aging: first 14 years in bourbon barrels, and then the finish in Caribbean rum barrels. This process gives the drink pronounced notes of tropical fruits (banana, pineapple), vanilla and caramel, providing a buttery, mild taste.
en.spirit-glen_18: Premium whiskey, which is famous for its 18-year aging in barrels of Oloroso sherry and bourbon. It has a deep, balanced taste with notes of baked apples, cinnamon, dried fruits and oak, produced in small batches.
en.spirit-glen_15: The key feature of which is the Solera Vat extract. After 15 years in barrels of bourbon, sherry and new oak, it is blended in a huge oak barrel that is never more than half empty, creating a rich, honey-spicy taste.
en.spirit-octomore: Released in a limited edition, it has a high cask strength (59.8%), using 100% Concerto Scottish barley and aged exclusively in American bourbon barrels (Jim Beam, Heaven Hill, Buffalo Trace, Jack Daniel's).
en.spirit-charlotte: Its main features are its high phenolic content (about 40 ppm), pronounced smoky character combined with fruity elegance, aging exclusively on the island and naturalness (without filtration and dyes).
en.spirit-bruichladdich: Despite its island origin, it is characterized by the absence of peat smoke, an oily texture, and a bright grain character with notes of citrus, honey, and sea breeze.
en.spirit-laphroaig: An iconic, powerful single malt Scotch whiskey from the island of Islay, known for its extremely smoky, peaty and «medicinal» taste (iodine, bandages, algae).
en.spirit-jura: Aged for 12 years in bourbon barrels with a finish in Oloroso sherry barrels. It has a mild, creamy taste with notes of smoke, spices, citrus fruits and dark chocolate, which makes it a balanced «entry» scotch into the world of smoky whiskey.
en.spirit-talisker: It is known for its powerful «marine» character, intense smoky peat aroma and unique peppery aftertaste. It is aged for at least 10 years in American oak barrels, has a bright golden color, notes of salt, citrus and dried fruits.
en.spirit-tullamore: A rare premium Irish single malt whiskey, characterized by 18 years of aging and finishing in four types of barrels (bourbon, sherry, port, madeira). It has a soft, velvety taste with notes of caramel, spices and fruits, as well as a caramelized aftertaste.
en.spirit-nikka: The legacy of the «father» of Japanese whiskey contains aromas of spices, oak, apricot, apple and toffee. The taste of the drink harmoniously combines the tones of vanilla, toffee, oak, apricot, raisins and lavender. Whiskey is produced on the island according to the same traditions as in Scotland.
en.spirit-m_shoulder: It is a blend of three single malt spirits (Glenfiddich, Balvenie, Kininvie), aged in bourbon barrels, with a mild vanilla-citrus flavor and a recognizable bottle with three brass monkeys are an important distinguishing feature.
en.spirit-j_d_single: Premium single-barrel whiskey, which differs from the standard Old No.7 by the unique character of each bottle, increased strength, deep taste with caramel-oak notes and double carbon filtration. A drink produced from one barrel has its own barrel number and the date of bottling on the label.
en.spirit-j_d_old: Its main feature is the unique filtration technology through a 3—meter layer of sugar maple charcoal (charcoal mellowing) before aging, which gives the drink a special smoothness.
en.spirit-makers: Premium American bourbon from Kentucky, characterized by the use of winter wheat instead of rye, which gives it a special softness, sweetness and buttery taste. Main features: manual production (small batches), 45% strength and unique sealing of the bottle with red sealing wax, making each copy unique.
en.spirit-j_b_bourbon: The world's best-selling bourbon from Kentucky, characterized by a mild, balanced taste with caramel-vanilla notes, spicy aroma and mandatory aging for at least 4 years in new burnt oak barrels.
en.spirit-j_b_rye: It is made according to a recipe from 1795 with 4 years of aging in new fired white oak barrels, which gives it a rich, rounded taste with caramel-fruity hints and a dry aftertaste.
en.spirit-chivas_25: Super premium Scotch blended whiskey, characterized by a rich fruity-nutty taste with hints of chocolate, as well as a luxurious bottle design. This is one of the most prestigious scotches created for use as a digestif.
en.spirit-chivas_21: It was created in 1953 in honor of the coronation of Elizabeth II. Its main features are a minimum alcohol exposure of 21 years, a rich taste with notes of nuts, smoke and sherry, as well as unique porcelain decanters (sapphire, ruby, emerald), symbolizing precious stones encrusted in the crown of the queen.
en.spirit-chivas_18: It is known for its velvety texture, deep amber color and complex taste with notes of dried fruits, toffee, dark chocolate and a light smoky finish.
en.spirit-chivas_12: It is characterized by high softness, balanced honey-fruit flavor. The blend is based on Speyside spirits (in particular Strathisla), which gives it rich notes of toffee, vanilla, hazelnuts and heather.
en.spirit-j_w_blue: Its main features are the use of very old (up to 60 years old) and rare alcohols selected from 1 barrel per 10,000, a mild, complex taste with notes of smoke, chocolate and dried fruits, as well as a mandatory individual number on the bottle confirming authenticity.
en.spirit-j_w_platinum: It has a rich, deep taste with notes of fruits, vanilla, nuts and a light smoky aftertaste that combines the character of the Speyside region and the classic Johnnie Walker style.
en.spirit-j_w_gold: Whiskey made from 15 different malt and grain alcohols. It has a rich, deep taste with notes of fruits, vanilla, nuts and a light smoky aftertaste that combines the character of the Speyside region and the classic Johnnie Walker style.
en.spirit-j_w_double: This blend differs from the classic Black Label in its richer smoky taste due to aging in heavily burnt oak barrels and the use of alcohols from the islands.
en.spirit-dewars: The main feature of the production is the use of «double aging» technology, when the blend is aged in barrels after mixing, which gives the drink a special softness.
en.spirit-tullamore_blended: Whiskey is aged from 3 to 7 years in barrels of bourbon and sherry. It has a mild taste due to triple distillation and aging.
en.spirit-jameson: Unlike its Scottish counterparts, Jameson has almost no smoky notes, as malt is dried in closed ovens. The base is a mixture of malted and unsalted barley, aged in barrels of bourbon and sherry.
en.spirit-bushmills: The oldest official distillery in the world (licensed since 1608), the key feature of which is triple distillation, which gives whiskey a special softness, as well as the use of mainly malt spirits.
en.spirit-hennessy_xo: It was created by Maurice Hennessy in 1870 for a narrow circle of his close friends and relatives. The cognac contains old spirits from family stocks. For about 80 years after that, Hennessy remained the only producer of cognac of this class, and the name H.O. was almost synonymous with Hennessy, and remains his pride to this day. The curly shape of the decanter bottle with the image of a vine was acquired by cognac «Hennessy» X.O only in 1947.
en.spirit-hennessy_vsop: In 1817, the House of Hennessy received an order for the manufacture of cognac from George IV himself, the reigning prince and future king of England. The order was to produce «a very superior old pale cognac eaux—de-vie», an old cognac of light color and exceptional quality. Hence the name of the cognac V.S.O.P. (Very Superior Old Pale), which speaks at once about its unique properties and long-term aging.
en.spirit-hennessy_vs: It consists of an assemblage of cognac spirits from the best wine—growing regions of the Cognac region, the number of spirits exceeds 40. «Hennessy» V.S is a benchmark among cognacs. The history of its creation dates back to 1865, when the great-grandson of the founder of the house, Maurice Hennessy, decided to introduce a star symbol to indicate the aging of his cognacs. At the same time, according to legend, Hennessy was inspired to choose this symbol by the asterisk on the window handle in his office. This is how cognac appeared with a 3-star symbol, which later became known as V.S.
en.spirit-remy_martin_xo: Ultra-premium cognac of the Fine Champagne class, characterized by a blend of more than 350-400 spirits aged from 10 to 37 years, mainly (85% or more) from the Grand and Petit Champagne regions. Its main feature is its velvety, rich taste with notes of figs, jasmine and cinnamon.
en.spirit-remy_martin_vsop: It is the most titled cognac in France, which has been produced since 1715. Cognac is made from grapes grown in the Grand Champagne region, which guarantees the exceptional quality of the drink. Three generations of blending masters have passed on their skills to create such a noble masterpiece from hand to hand.
en.spirit-marquis: Its main features are a rich amber color, a complex aroma with hints of prunes, vanilla and spices, as well as a delicate, fruity taste.
en.spirit-coquerel: It represents a combination of fresh fruits and rich woody tones, as well as a complex, balanced taste with notes of baked apples, vanilla and spices.
en.spirit-godet: The key feature of this light brandy is its crystal clear color, achieved through special filtration. Created in honor of the expedition to Antarctica, it is intended to be consumed strongly chilled (4-6 °C).
en.spirit-ararat_ten: Known for its deep amber color, this vintage Armenian brandy has a rich taste with hints of prunes, beeswax and walnuts.
en.spirit-ararat_ani: Its special feature is its rich amber color, intense taste with pleasant sweetness, spicy long aftertaste and the use of local grape varieties.
en.spirit-metaxa: Premium Greek brandy, characterized by a unique blend of wine distillates, muscat wines from the Aegean Islands and a secret extract of Mediterranean herbs and rose petals.
en.baijiu-description: The exquisite baijiu embodies the traditions of Chinese distillation. Each sip reveals a complex harmony of cereal notes and refined strength.
en.spirit-baijiu: An iconic drink known as the «national spirit drink» of China, which is aged in ceramic vessels, which gives it a soft, multifaceted taste with notes of nuts and smoke.
en.grappa-description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of sunny Italy with noble grappa. The drink, created according to ancient recipes, will enchant you with the depth of its aroma and silky texture.
en.spirit-grappa: It combines bright freshness, fruity notes, balsamic shades with barrel aging, which gives it a noble amber color, vanilla notes and a mild taste.
en.liqueur-description: An exquisite collection for true connoisseurs. From the mysterious wormwood magic to the delicate fruit and berry notes, every sip will be a discovery.
en.spirit-absinthe: A revived classic with more than 200 years of history, distinguished by its authentic taste, high strength and natural emerald green color.
en.spirit-baileys: The main feature is the creation of a unique stable emulsion of natural fresh cream and triple distilled Irish whiskey, which do not sour or delaminate without preservatives for 2 years. This is the world's first creamy liqueur that combines a delicate taste with a strength of 17%.
en.spirit-drambuie: Premium Scotch liqueur with a strength of 40%, the special feature of which is a combination of aged single malt whiskey, heather honey, spices and herbs.
en.spirit-j_d_fire: The main feature is the explosive, spicy taste of cinnamon with caramel notes, which warms up perfectly. The drink is produced through the famous maple charcoal filtration.
en.spirit-italicus: It has a fresh, floral-citrus taste with notes of lavender and spicy bitterness due to the use of Calabrian bergamot and Sicilian citrons.
en.spirit-sambuca: The creation process uses Chinese star anise, which creates an intense, fresh taste balanced with sweet notes.
en.pornstar-description: With a series of Porn Star cocktails, we invite you to go on a gastronomic journey: from tropical passion fruit to sophisticated yuzu, velvety peach and exotic lychee, each option reveals a new flavor duo against the backdrop of sparkling prosecco and airy aquafaba.
en.masterpieces-p_s_classic: Immerse yourself in a tropical mood with Porn Star Martini: gentle author's vanilla vodka in a duet with passion fruit, lime sourness, hypoallergenic protein and light sparkling prosecco.
en.masterpieces-p_s_yuzu: An exquisite combination of gin with the citrus depth of yuzu puree, a subtle note of author's jasmine syrup and the freshness of lemon juice. The light texture of the aquafaba and sparkling prosecco create a flawless finish.
en.masterpieces-p_s_peach: The delicate peach flavor combined with light rum is revealed by the delicate acidity of lime juice, and the airy texture of the aquafaba and sparkling prosecco add lightness and conviviality to the cocktail.
en.masterpieces-p_s_lychee: The exquisite combination of tequila and velvety lychee puree is complemented by delicate agave syrup, while lime sourness, airy texture of aquafaba and sparkling prosecco create a unique balance of taste and texture.
en.martinis-description: The epitome of cocktail aesthetics. From the strict Dry Martini to the complex Martinez, each drink demonstrates the skill of the bartender and the depth of flavor combinations. Elegance in every detail.
en.masterpieces-dirty_martini: Created for connoisseurs of bold combinations: mild vodka and dry vermouth acquire a new character thanks to the spicy olive brine. Balanced taste with a light salty note and refined depth.
en.masterpieces-dry_martini: The epitome of minimalism and elegance. The pure taste of gin in a duet with dry vermouth: nothing superfluous, just impeccable harmony and aristocratic restraint. The perfect choice for those who appreciate classics without compromise.
en.masterpieces-lucien: An exquisite balance of bitterness and sweetness. Gin and dry vermouth are complemented by the noble bitterness of Campari and the light citrus sweetness of triple sec. A complex, multifaceted taste with a long aftertaste.
en.masterpieces-martinez: Gin combined with red vermouth creates a dense base, complemented by the cherry notes of Maraschino liqueur and the spicy depth of Angostura bitters. An exquisite choice for connoisseurs of complex compositions.
en.masterpieces-perfect_martini: A gin with a perfect balance of dry and red vermouth, complemented by a subtle note of Angostura bitter. Balanced, rounded taste with a multi-layered opening.
en.masterpieces-vesper_martini: A legendary cocktail with a history. The famous phrase «Shaken, not stirred» became his calling card. The exquisite combination of ingredients reveals a special texture — pure, transparent and flawlessly smooth.
en.gin_tonic-description: It carries the spirit of sea adventure: created by English sailors to fight malaria, today this cocktail is revealed in five exquisite variations, where each brand of gin gives the drink a special character.
en.masterpieces-monkey_based: A composition of German gin Monkey 47, Schweppes tonic and juicy lemon (tart lime / fresh cucumber) of your choice.
en.masterpieces-ukiyo_based: A composition of Japanese Ukiyo Yuzu gin, Schweppes tonic and juicy lemon (tart lime / fresh cucumber) of your choice.
en.masterpieces-botanist_based: A composition of The Botanist's Scottish gin, Schweppes tonic and juicy lemon (tart lime / fresh cucumber) of your choice.
en.masterpieces-hendricks_based: A composition of Hendrick's Scottish gin, Schweppes tonic and juicy lemon (tart lime / fresh cucumber) of your choice.
en.masterpieces-bombay_based: A composition of Bombay Sapphire English gin, Schweppes tonic and juicy lemon (tart lime / fresh cucumber) of your choice.
en.masterpieces-gordons_based: A composition of Gordon's Scottish gin, Schweppes tonic and juicy lemon (tart lime / fresh cucumber) of your choice.
en.layered-description: Five bright compositions created according to the laws of bar physics: the density of ingredients creates flawless boundaries, and the combination of flavors gives unforgettable sensations. But everything has its exceptions, doesn't it?
en.masterpieces-ps: A pre-prepared mix of signature vanilla vodka, passion fruit & lime juice
en.masterpieces-silver_bullet: Tequila silver, lemon pulp, coffee liqueur
en.masterpieces-xxo: Dark rum, lime juice & bubble gum

zh.masterpieces-description: 这是我们专业技艺与匠心精神的精华体现，通过对经典鸡尾酒的重新演绎而诞生。在瞬息万变的时代，我们相信鸡尾酒同样值得被赋予新的表达，以契合不断变化的味觉审美。
zh.masterpieces-manhattan: 在炭烤橡木桶中熟成44天，这款曼哈顿的全新演绎融合原创苦味酒，搭配佩德罗·希梅内斯雪莉酒与美国黑麦威士忌的浓郁芳香，层次丰富而深邃。
zh.masterpieces-smash: 金酒、花香苦精与紫罗勒特制糖浆的精妙结合，并点缀一抹神秘而轻盈的隐藏风味，呈现优雅迷人的口感。
zh.masterpieces-blazer: 尊尼获加黑牌威士忌、糖粉与水的燃烧混合，在两只酒碗间来回倾倒，创造出一款极具仪式感的鸡尾酒。根据传奇调酒师Jerry Thomas的传统，这款酒仅在气温不高于10°C时提供。
zh.masterpieces-negroni: 融合椰奶的柔和质感，金酒、味美思与苦味酒在覆盆子与迷迭香上陈酿12天，呈现出色泽淡雅却风味均衡的独特演绎。
zh.masterpieces-penicillin: 经典元素焕发新生，在艾雷岛风味与藏红花香气的交织中，展现迷人而富有层次的感官体验。
zh.masterpieces-champagne: 精选香槟与来自干邑产区的X.O.生命之水奢华融合，辅以圭亚那糖与微妙苦感，搭配一瓶酩悦香槟，带您踏上一段如传奇邮轮般的华丽旅程。
zh.treasure-description: 我们打造了一张风味图谱，以五款鸡尾酒诠释儒家核心伦理理念，通过独特的香气与口感组合，带来层次分明的感官体验。
zh.treasure-gray: 烟熏、烘烤、焦糖与坚果风味
zh.treasure-passion: 甜美、花香、柑橘与果香风味
zh.treasure-blue: 甜润、草本、柑橘与植物风味
zh.treasure-amethyst: 草本、鲜味、泥土气息与辛香植物风味
zh.treasure-rose: 甜美、花香、柑橘与植物风味
zh.classic-description: 本系列入选标准基于其原始配方与国际调酒师协会（IBA）现行规范之间的差异，力求还原创作者最初的构想。
zh.alexander-description: 这款鸡尾酒最早可追溯至1916年《Inquirer》报纸第11版。当时配方使用金酒与浅色可可利口酒，而非如今国际调酒师协会所规定的白兰地与深色可可利口酒。
zh.corpse-description: 我们特别提醒，名称中的“1”并非随意标注。复活者（Corpse Reviver）至少存在四种版本，而仅有#2版本被列入IBA官方名单。
zh.corpse-calvados: 卡尔瓦多斯苹果白兰地
zh.hemingway-description: 传奇的“Papa Doble”版本，专为欧内斯特·海明威打造，展现清爽与张力并存的独特风格。
zh.hemingway-maraschino: 马拉斯奇诺樱桃利口酒
zh.oldfashioned-description: 我们采用1862年版《The Bar-Tender's Guide》中的原始配方。据说老式杯（Old-Fashioned）源于美国西部酒吧的枪战——子弹常击碎瓶身，酒吧老板便将瓶口切除，用剩余部分盛酒。
zh.planters-description: 我们采用1948年《The Fine Art of Mixing Drinks》中记载的配方（考虑到甘蔗汁可能并不常见）。该酒由Myers's朗姆酒创始人Fred L. Myers于19世纪末创作。
zh.zombie-description: 我们采用1934年的原始配方，由Don Beach在美国好莱坞的Don the Beachcomber餐厅创作。此酒因酒精度极高而得名——数杯之后，宾客仿佛“行尸走肉”。
zh.unforgettables-description: 本系列呈现调酒史上的标志性之作，其中许多自20世纪初以来便成为酒吧文化的基石与象征。
zh.appletini-description: 据其中一个版本记载，“Appletini”诞生于20世纪90年代的美国，由调酒师Adam Karsten在洛杉矶的Dell'Ermo餐厅创作。
zh.bees-description: 最初版本的这款经典鸡尾酒由杜松子酒、蜂蜜和柠檬混合而成（根据1929年《巴黎鸡尾酒》一书中的配方，其中巴黎丽兹酒店的首席调酒师弗兰克·迈耶被列为创作者）。
zh.boulevardier-description: 一般认为这款鸡尾酒出自美国记者兼移民作家厄斯金·格温之手。他也是著名杂志《The Boulevardier》的联合作者和编辑。
zh.caipirinha-description: 名称直译为“乡村小姑娘”，起源于圣保罗州的乡村地区。
zh.cardinale-description: 这款类似尼格罗尼的意大利鸡尾酒由乔瓦尼·雷蒙多于20世纪50年代在当时的埃克塞尔西奥酒店酒吧创作，正值教皇庇护十二世的1950年圣禧年。
zh.corpse_2-description: “连续喝四杯会让尸体再次复活”——这是哈里·克拉多克在《萨沃伊鸡尾酒书》（1930）中为此配方写下的注释。
zh.espresso_martini-description: 据说它诞生于20世纪80年代末。故事发生在伦敦，当时迪克·布拉德塞尔在“Soho Brasserie”酒吧工作。一天，一位模特走向他，请求调制一款“能让她清醒又滋润”的鸡尾酒。
zh.connection-description: 以1971年美国犯罪惊悚片《法国贩毒网》命名。这款以白兰地为基底的鸡尾酒与以威士忌为基底、以《教父》命名的“教父”鸡尾酒互为亲属。
zh.grasshopper-description: 这是新奥尔良第二古老餐厅 Tujague’s 的招牌鸡尾酒。传说1919年（或禁酒令时期的1920年代），酒吧合伙人之一菲利贝尔·吉歇凭借这款“蚱蜢”鸡尾酒在纽约的著名调酒比赛中获得二等奖。
zh.horsesneck-description: 最初，“马颈”是一款以姜汁汽水为基础并加入苦精的饮品。加入白兰地或威士忌后被称为“Kick”，大约于1910年首次出现。如今更以其含烈酒的版本而闻名。
zh.maitai-description: 一般认为这款鸡尾酒由维克多·朱尔斯·伯杰龙于1944年创作。据说当晚他将新调制的饮品给来自塔希提的好友品尝，其中一位在第一口后惊呼“mai tai-roa aé”，意为“超凡脱俗——太棒了！”。
zh.monkey-description: 由哈里·麦克埃隆于1920年代末在巴黎的 Harry’s New York Bar 创作。名称源自谢尔盖·沃罗诺夫博士的研究，他认为睾酮对长寿至关重要，并曾为法国老人移植猴子睾丸。
zh.moscow_mule-description: 1939年，约翰·G·马丁为 Heublein 公司购入斯米尔诺夫伏特加的销售权。与此同时，他的朋友、好莱坞 Cock’n’Bull 酒吧老板杰克·摩根试图推广自家姜汁啤酒但销量不佳。传说两人在纽约 Chatham Bar 相遇，决定将伏特加与姜汁啤酒混合，并加入青柠（可能受古巴自由的启发），从而诞生了“莫斯科骡子”。
zh.ny_sour-description: 据说这款饮品最早于19世纪80年代在芝加哥调制，最初名为 Continental Sour，之后称为 Southern Whiskey Sour，也曾以 Brunswick Sour 和 Claret Snap 的名字出现。后来因在曼哈顿流行而被称为“纽约酸”。
zh.cuban-description: “老古巴”虽仅有二十余年历史，却已成为经典。由奥黛丽·桑德斯于2001年创作，并成为纽约 Pegu Club 的招牌。它被视为“莫吉托”和“法国75”之间的中间风格。关键在于使用陈年朗姆酒，因此得名“老”。
zh.paloma-description: “Paloma”在西班牙语中意为“鸽子”。其起源不明，但一般认为诞生于20世纪50年代。有些人将其归功于墨西哥特基拉镇 La Capilla 酒吧的传奇老板唐·哈维尔·德尔加多·科罗纳。
zh.pina-description: 三位波多黎各调酒师都声称自己是这款国饮的创作者。但在此我们只强调一点：我们不使用椰子糖浆，并且饮品应以搅拌方式制作。
zh.paper_plane-description: 这款对经典“最后一词”的改良版由萨姆·罗斯于2007年在芝加哥 The Violet Hour 创作。最初使用金巴利和诺尼诺苦味酒，后来在纽约 Milk & Honey 调制时改用更柔和的开胃利口酒。
zh.porto_flip-description: 首次出现于杰里·托马斯1887年的著作《调酒师指南》中。这是唯一被列入 IBA 名单的 Flip 类鸡尾酒，尽管它只是该家族众多成员之一。
zh.russian-description: 由迪克·布拉德塞尔于20世纪80年代在伦敦创作（他也是“黑莓”鸡尾酒的作者）。他说：“我称它为 Russian Spring Punch，因为它用了俄罗斯伏特加，而且是一款清爽的气泡饮。”
zh.rusty-description: 1942年在夏威夷一家酒吧为艺术家西奥多·安德森创作，并于1950年代在纽约 Club 21 流行。大卫·温德里奇追溯了自1937年以来苏格兰威士忌与 Drambuie 利口酒的混合过程，并创作了名为 B.I.F. 的饮品。
zh.sidecar-description: 我们采用“法国学派”1:1:1 的经典配方（罗伯特·维尔梅尔《Cocktails: How to Mix Them》，1922；哈里·麦克埃隆《ABC of Cocktails》，1922）。
zh.sour-description: 请选择基酒，我们会为您调制您想要的酸酒。
zh.sour-spirit: 波本 / 金酒 / 伏特加 / 朗姆酒 / 龙舌兰
zh.spicy_fifty-description: 由英国调酒师协会长期主席萨尔瓦托雷·卡拉布雷塞为其伦敦的 Fifty 酒吧创作，并于 2005 年 2 月开业时成为首款招牌鸡尾酒。
zh.bastard-description: 1942 年由乔·夏洛姆在埃及开罗的谢泼德酒店创作。原始手写配方（由其女儿提供）使用白兰地。但在白兰地难以获得的地方常以波本代替。由于部分客人认为“bastard”一词不雅，这款酒曾短暂被称为“受苦的调酒师”。
zh.tommys-description: 约于 1987/88 年由胡里奥·贝尔梅霍创作，并以其家族在旧金山经营、号称“世界最佳龙舌兰酒吧”的墨西哥餐厅命名。
zh.amaro_bitter-description: 精致的草本开胃酒，带有轻柔或鲜明的苦味。其复杂的风味在纯饮或加冰、餐前享用时尤为突出。
zh.aperitif-amaro: 配方被严格保密，只知道酒精、香料和苦味草本混合后需陈放三个月。
zh.aperitif-becherovka: 捷克的国饮，被视为国家名片。诞生于1807年，最初作为促进消化的药用饮品供应。
zh.aperitif-campari: 配方包含60多种成分。独特的风味结构结合浓郁辛香与迷人的红色，带来丰富而不可预测的感官体验。
zh.aperitif-hirschrudel: 公司老板迪尔克·韦普特称其产品基于祖母的古老配方。配方包含31种草本，如欧当归、缬草、龙胆、金黍、当归根、芫荽等。根据祖母艾莉书中发现的古方制作，每年仅生产3000瓶，每瓶均有独立编号。
zh.aperitif-jagermeister: 名称意为“猎人之王”。含有50多种成分（果皮、香料、根茎）。通过浸渍工艺制成，并在橡木桶中陈酿12个月，使其口感柔和而丰富。最初用于改善消化的药用目的。
zh.aperitif-rossbacher: Rossbacher 是传统奥地利草本利口酒（酒精度32%），自1897年以来以秘密配方由草本、根茎和浆果制成。其特点是辛香、微苦，并带有柑橘风味。可纯饮、加冰或调制饮品。
zh.aperitif-suze: 自1889年以来，Suze 品牌以龙胆根与多种芳香植物的调和而闻名，创造出具有浓郁苦香的经典开胃酒。
zh.aperitif-dom: 唐·培里侬 2012 年份香槟是一款奢华之作，酿酒大师文森特·沙佩隆称其“融合了技巧与谦逊”。尽管当年气候严酷、收成艰难，但这款香槟成为“逆境中的胜利”，呈现出非典型却深邃、激动人心的风格。
zh.bouquet-dom: 油桃、杏、薄荷、番石榴、白胡椒
zh.aperitif-veuve: 凯歌酒庄的标志性香槟，常被称为“黄牌”。采用黑皮诺（50–55%）、霞多丽（30–35%）和皮诺·莫尼耶（15–20%）酿制。加入25–35%陈年基酒（10–20年）以确保每一批次都呈现酒庄独特风格。至少陈酿三年。
zh.grape-veuve: 黑皮诺、皮诺·莫尼耶、霞多丽
zh.aperitif-moet: 这款标志性特酿诞生于1869年，年复一年展现品牌风格，以多汁果香和清爽口感深受喜爱。用于调配的葡萄酒超过100种，其中20–30%为陈年样酒，由酿酒师因其成熟度、复杂性和个性而特别挑选。
zh.grape-moet: 黑皮诺、皮诺·莫尼耶、霞多丽
zh.bouquet-moet: 青苹果、新鲜糕点、甜瓜、矿物质
zh.aperitif-asti: 马天尼“Asti”占全球阿斯蒂类别葡萄酒产量的约27%。酒标上的意大利、西班牙和葡萄牙王室徽章表明该酒曾供应给这些欧洲王室。
zh.aperitif-cremant: 这款桃红起泡酒由黑皮诺酿制，展现了阿尔萨斯风土下该品种的典型果香。细腻的气泡赋予其节日般的优雅气质。
zh.aperitif-abuelo: 产自西班牙东北部鲜为人知的阿尔曼萨地区。口感细腻柔滑、气泡清爽，适合搭配烤三文鱼、鸡肉或蔬菜意面。
zh.region-abuelo: 西班牙，拉曼恰，阿尔曼萨
zh.grape-abuelo: 马卡贝奥、帕雷亚达、沙雷洛
zh.aperitif-luna: 一款风格轻松、果香主导的普罗赛克，以苹果和梨的风味为主，比香槟更柔和，也因此更容易受到大众喜爱。
zh.region-luna: 意大利，威尼托，特雷维索普罗赛克
zh.champagne-description: 来自法国香槟产区的起泡酒，气泡细腻，口感清新优雅。非常适合特别时刻与节庆氛围。
zh.sparkling-description: 来自世界各地的起泡葡萄酒，具有清爽的酸度和活泼的气泡。轻盈优雅，适合作为开胃酒或营造节日气氛。
zh.wine-manieri: ANGELO ROCCA & FIGLI 的历史始于1880年，当时弗朗切斯科·罗卡创立了 Vinicola Rocca 酒庄，成为其后四代家族的事业核心。葡萄酒在低温控制下发酵，并在钢罐中陈酿三个月。
zh.wine-parellada: 这款优雅的半干白葡萄酒由米格尔·托雷斯为妻子在情人节特别酿制，因此得名。采用加泰罗尼亚地区传统的帕雷亚达葡萄，来自酒庄高山有机葡萄园。
zh.wine-kisi: 葡萄采自生长在冲积土壤、含黑色页岩碎片的葡萄藤，藤龄至少10年。每公顷产量限制在不超过8吨，以确保品质。
zh.wine-balsamum: 来自阳光充足的里斯本葡萄园，受大西洋海风调节，使葡萄品种达到糖分与清新度的完美平衡。葡萄藤密度为4200株/公顷，有助于获得成熟而不失活力的果味。
zh.grape-balsamum: 维德略、费尔瑙皮雷斯、维欧辛纽
zh.wine-myskhako: 采收结束后，葡萄进行传统酿造，在钢罐中严格控温发酵。适合作为开胃酒，也非常搭配清淡小食、鱼类和海鲜。
zh.region-myskhako: 俄罗斯，克拉斯诺达尔边疆区
zh.wine-gato: 这款智利干白由中央山谷 La Huerta 葡萄园的霞多丽酿制。安第斯山脉的影响使葡萄在成熟期温度降低，从而形成芳香浓郁、果味突出的葡萄酒。
zh.wine-rocca: 这款干红由普利亚萨伦托地区的两种本土葡萄——内格罗阿马罗与普里米蒂沃混酿而成。采收后在控温条件下进行发酵酿造。
zh.region-rocca: 意大利，普利亚，萨伦托 I.G.T.
zh.grape-rocca: 内格罗阿马罗、普里米蒂沃
zh.bouquet-rocca: 成熟红色水果、烟草、香料
zh.wine-mukuzani: 穆库扎尼被誉为“格鲁吉亚葡萄酒之王子”，是当地最著名的干红之一。酒色深石榴红，樱桃与黑加仑的鲜活香气与香草和橡木的气息完美平衡。
zh.wine-kindzmarauli: 金兹马劳利呈深石榴红色，带有典型微红光泽，是该微产区的特征。甜度与酸度和谐平衡，余味愉悦，体现出高品质葡萄酒的风格。
zh.wine-pata_negra: 这款精致的干红由瓦尔德佩尼亚斯产区精选添普兰尼洛葡萄酿制。当地风土以排水良好的黏土-石灰岩土壤和干燥阳光充足的气候为特征。
zh.region-pata_negra: 西班牙，里奥哈，瓦尔德佩尼亚斯 DO
zh.wine-gato_carmenere: 多汁的智利佳美娜，带有黑加仑、蓝莓和咖啡的香气。柔和的单宁与轻微的涩感使其成为肉类菜肴的绝佳搭配。
zh.wine-mateus: 这款葡萄酒的历史可追溯至1942年，当时酒庄创始人希望打造一款个性鲜明、风味独特并采用创新包装的葡萄酒。瓶型灵感来自第一次世界大战时期的士兵水壶。
zh.grape-mateus: 图丽加弗兰卡、廷塔巴罗卡、鲁菲特、巴加
zh.wine-codici: 酒庄名称源自“codes（密码）”，象征其灵感来自普利亚这片野性而独特土地的文化密码。该地区拥有丰富的历史遗产，以莱切巴洛克建筑的辉煌为代表。
zh.bouquet-codici: 草莓、覆盆子、红色水果与花香
zh.wine-santa_digna: 这款酒的风格源于来自不同地块的赤霞珠葡萄，在果皮上浸渍2天后，于18°C的钢罐中发酵19天。发酵结束后立即装瓶，以保留其新鲜果香。
zh.bouquet-santa_digna: 黑加仑、香草与奶油风味
zh.wine-tawny: 由多款平均陈年约10年的葡萄酒调配而成。长期在小型木桶中熟成赋予其典型的砖红色，以及新鲜、持久且精致的复杂香气。
zh.grape-tawny: 图丽加纳西奥纳、图丽加弗兰卡、廷塔罗里斯、廷塔康、苏扎翁
zh.wine-marthas: 这款出色的红宝石波特以其平衡感和丰富风味令人印象深刻，每一口都带来特别的体验。适合搭配黑巧克力、巧克力甜点以及浅色柔软奶酪。
zh.grape-marthas: 图丽加纳西奥纳、廷塔罗里斯、图丽加弗兰卡、廷托康、廷塔巴罗卡、廷塔阿马雷拉
zh.wine-gonzales_cream: 这款雪莉在口感上呈现出极为浓郁的果香，部分来自其残余甜度。质地饱满、层次复杂，是一款浓郁而富有表现力的加强型葡萄酒。
zh.region-gonzales_cream: 西班牙，安达卢西亚，赫雷斯 D.O.
zh.grape-gonzales_cream: 帕洛米诺 75%，佩德罗·希梅内斯 25%
zh.wine-gonzales_pedro: 浓郁的甜味与丝滑的质地及平衡的酸度相结合，余味悠长，带有蜂蜜与坚果的包裹感。
zh.region-gonzales_pedro: 西班牙，安达卢西亚，赫雷斯 D.O.
zh.red_wine_fr_bottle-title: 红葡萄酒·法国·750 毫升
zh.red_wine_it_bottle-title: 红葡萄酒·意大利·750 毫升
zh.red_wine_esp_bottle-title: 红葡萄酒·西班牙·750 毫升
zh.red_wine_arg_bottle-title: 红葡萄酒·阿根廷·750 毫升
zh.red_wine_chile_bottle-title: 红葡萄酒·智利·750 毫升
zh.red_wine_nz_bottle-title: 红葡萄酒·新西兰·750 毫升
zh.red_wine_fr_bottle-description: 法国红酒展现了自然与酿酒师技艺的和谐统一.每一杯都呈现出丰富的风味层次:从成熟浆果与樱桃的芬芳,到香料,皮革与橡木的微妙气息.
zh.red_wine_it_bottle-description: 意大利红酒是南国香气的交响乐:成熟樱桃,李子,野莓的芬芳交织着香料与橡木气息.让您尽情享受地中海腹地酿造的深邃与优雅.
zh.red_wine_esp_bottle-description: 西班牙红酒谱写着南国香气的交响乐章:成熟樱桃,黑莓,李子的果香与香料,皮革,橡木气息完美融合.邀您品味西班牙阳光下诞生的醇厚与热情.
zh.red_wine_arg_bottle-description: 阿根廷红酒以其深度与和谐令人沉醉:从巴塔哥尼亚优雅的黑皮诺,到门多萨雄浑的马尔贝克.每一口都是深入安第斯山麓葡萄园核心的味觉之旅.
zh.red_wine_chile_bottle-description: 智利红酒将以其深度与平衡令您着迷.每一口都是通往安第斯山麓的味觉旅程.
zh.red_wine_nz_bottle-description: 新西兰精致的黑皮诺是自然与酿酒师技艺的完美结晶.优雅的结构,细腻的矿物气息与悠长余韵,使这些佳酿成为特殊时刻的理想之选.
zh.white_wine_fr_bottle-description: 法国白葡萄酒如同水彩风景:轻盈,通透,令人神往.想象晨雾中的夏布利葡萄园,或是落日余晖下的阿尔萨斯山坡——这一切都凝聚在酒杯之中.
zh.white_wine_it_bottle-description: 酿酒师技艺与地中海风土的完美体现.细腻的酸度,复杂的香气层次与悠长余韵,使这些佳酿足以搭配最精致的美食.
zh.white_wine_austria_bottle-description: 奥地利雷司令以高酸度为特征,带有柑橘与青果香气,并辅以矿物风味.酵母接触与精准的发酵温控,更突显了葡萄品种的纯粹特质.
zh.white_wine_esp_bottle-description: 西班牙白葡萄酒将以和谐与深度令您陶醉:从阿尔巴利诺的清新,到弗德乔的优雅,再到陈年马卡贝奥的复杂.每一口都是穿越大西洋沿岸阳光葡萄园,深入拉曼查腹地的味觉之旅.
zh.white_wine_chile_bottle-description: 智利霞多丽融合了新世界的优良传统与中央山谷的独特风土.坐落于安第斯山脉与太平洋之间的葡萄园,孕育出果香明快且酸度平衡的佳酿.
zh.white_wine_nz_bottle-description: 新西兰白葡萄酒诠释着纯净风土与酿酒师的匠心.长相思以其锐利的清新感令人沉醉,灰皮诺则以复杂的香气与丝滑质感见长.每一口都是通往太平洋沿岸的味觉之旅.
zh.wine-brane: 这款令人惊叹的葡萄酒被众多知名酒评家誉为酒庄最佳甚至是最杰出的作品之一。葡萄采收时间为9月22日至10月17日，并加入了极少量在主品种之后三天采收的佳美娜。葡萄酒在橡木桶中陈酿18个月（75%新桶，25%一年桶）。
zh.region-brane: 法国，波尔多，玛歌列级名庄
zh.grape-brane: 赤霞珠、品丽珠、美乐、佳美娜
zh.wine-magnol: 这款多汁、鲜活而优雅的干红由酿酒师贝尔纳·富拉打造，他致力于从葡萄中提取最大风味，以呈现一款名副其实——强劲、可靠、结构良好的葡萄酒。
zh.wine-la_gorce: 这款精致葡萄酒由两种葡萄酿制，各自为酒体贡献独特特性：赤霞珠赋予结构与陈年潜力，美乐带来果味的多汁与柔和。
zh.wine-saint_martin: 酒体呈红宝石色，果味柔和，带有李子与樱桃的香气，中等单宁，余味辛香。这是一款经典、亲和的葡萄酒，适合搭配烤肉。
zh.wine-meysonniers_red: 葡萄采自至少25年树龄、位于埃米塔日南坡的葡萄藤。酒液陈酿约12个月：90%在混凝土罐中熟成，以突出清新、矿物感与纯净果味；其余10%在橡木桶中熟成，赋予结构、深度与细腻木香。
zh.region-meysonniers_red: 法国，罗讷河谷，克罗兹-埃米塔日
zh.wine-castan: 优雅而浓郁的葡萄酒，呈深红宝石色。香气复杂，包含浆果、香料与紫罗兰。口感饱满，单宁丝滑，余味辛香而持久。
zh.wine-sassicaia: 这款酒因葡萄园的岩石土壤而得名。葡萄园位于海拔80–300米，受海洋气候与周围丘陵的保护。葡萄酒在法国橡木桶中陈酿24个月，其中三分之一为新桶。
zh.region-sassicaia: 意大利，超级托斯卡纳，博尔盖里 Superiore
zh.wine-astuto: Astuto 的卓越风格源自里卡索利男爵的丰富经验与托斯卡纳肥沃的土地。葡萄酒在法国橡木桶中陈酿18个月，装瓶后再在瓶中熟成10个月。
zh.region-astuto: 意大利，托斯卡纳，博尔盖里 Superiore
zh.grape-astuto: 赤霞珠、品丽珠、美乐、小维多
zh.wine-pater: 来自“经典·现代”系列的佳酿。酒标上印有弗雷斯科巴尔迪家族于15世纪由吉兰达约设计的家族徽章，象征传统与创新的统一。
zh.wine-librante: 这是一款浓郁优雅的干红，呈深红宝石色。香气以成熟红色水果（李子、樱桃）、无花果、可可、甜香料、香草与烟草为主。口感深邃温暖，单宁柔和，余味悠长。
zh.region-librante: 意大利，普利亚，曼杜里亚普里米蒂沃 D.O.P.
zh.wine-inici: 这款西班牙干红呈深樱桃色，带有红色浆果与茴香的香气。口感清新平衡，单宁柔和，带有果味、香草与优雅悠长的余味，并在法国橡木桶中陈酿12个月。
zh.region-inici: 西班牙，普里奥拉托 D.O.Q.
zh.grape-inici: 歌海娜、佳丽酿、西拉、赤霞珠
zh.wine-beronia: 展现出年轻而果味浓郁的风格，单宁活泼，并带有细腻的烟草气息。复杂而丰富的香气由浆果与香料的成熟风味交织而成。
zh.grape-beronia: 添普兰尼洛、格拉西亚诺、马祖爱罗
zh.wine-trapiche_red: 这款干红由马尔贝克酿制，葡萄生长在门多萨河上游的葡萄园。该地区的条件赋予葡萄酒纯净、鲜明的个性与清晰的品种特征。
zh.region-trapiche_red: 阿根廷，门多萨，卢汉-德库约
zh.wine-pedro_carmenere: 这款干红由佳美娜酿制，葡萄生长在毛莱谷，这是圣佩德罗酒庄最南端的产区，气候温暖干燥。
zh.wine-pedro_castillo: 呈现浓郁的红宝石色，香气复杂，带有成熟黑色浆果、香料、香草与巧克力的气息。酒体中等，单宁柔和，余味平衡而悠长。
zh.wine-spy_valley: 葡萄由人工采收。葡萄汁在开放式发酵槽中发酵，随后压榨、与果皮分离，并在橡木桶中陈酿11个月。
zh.bouquet-spy_valley: 烤坚果、成熟李子、干香料
zh.wine-cote_de_lechet: 一款精致、富有矿物感且充满阳光气息的白葡萄酒，非常适合初秋温暖的夜晚——仍能感受到夏日的气息，却又渴望杯中带来清爽的凉意。
zh.wine-pierrelee: 葡萄经过严格筛选后进行低温浸渍（冷浸渍），以更好地保留品种的风味与矿物感。随后在不锈钢罐中完成酒精发酵与苹果酸-乳酸发酵。之后在酒泥上陈酿约六个月。
zh.wine-meysonniers_white: 采用树龄20至40年的葡萄酿造。葡萄园位于罗讷河谷北部的克罗兹-埃米塔日产区，坐落于朝南的缓坡上。由黏土、卵石和砾石构成的分层土壤赋予葡萄丰富的风味与鲜明的个性。
zh.region-meysonniers_white: 法国·罗讷河谷·克罗兹-埃米塔日
zh.wine-zibibbo: 西西里的葡萄酒一直备受关注，独特的风土条件赋予葡萄酒与众不同的表现力。麝香葡萄在当地被称为Zibibbo，以多层次的热带水果风味展现魅力，赋予葡萄酒迷人的香气与丰富的口感。
zh.wine-gavi: 这款年轻、清新且结构平衡的白葡萄酒采用生长于加维产区黏土与砂质土壤上的科尔特塞葡萄酿造。在酒泥上陈酿4个月，赋予酒体更佳的层次与质感。
zh.wine-insolia: 这是一款迷人的单一品种白葡萄酒，采用西西里本土的因佐利亚葡萄酿造，该品种主要分布于西西里岛西部地区。
zh.wine-rabl: 来自坎普塔尔产区的优雅干型奥地利白葡萄酒。口感清新明亮，酸度爽脆，矿物感鲜明，并带有柠檬、青苹果和杏子的风味。
zh.wine-albarino: 这款明亮、极为清新且充满活力的葡萄酒洋溢着生活的喜悦，是酒庄的旗舰之作。
zh.region-albarino: 西班牙·加利西亚·下海湾
zh.wine-beronia_verdejo: 来自鲁埃达产区的清新干型西班牙白葡萄酒。酒液呈淡稻草色，口感结构分明，酸度活跃，余味持久并带有一丝微苦，非常适合搭配海鲜。
zh.region-beronia_verdejo: 西班牙·卡斯蒂利亚-莱昂·鲁埃达
zh.wine-el_coto: 这款干型白葡萄酒由弗德乔、维乌拉和长相思混酿而成。葡萄采自里奥哈阿尔塔的“Finca Carbonera”高海拔葡萄园（海拔840米），赋予酒体更佳的清新度与表现力。
zh.wine-invivo: 这款葡萄酒专为新西兰长相思爱好者打造。葡萄种植于马尔堡产区，并在怀卡托的Te Kauwhata酒庄酿造。香气充满热带水果气息，芳香奔放；口感浓郁饱满，带有甜美果味，同时保持清脆爽口的酸度。
zh.wine-framingham: 这是一款浓郁芳香的干型白葡萄酒，质地柔和顺滑。散发红苹果、梨子与香料气息，口感呈现烤苹果、梨子与白桃风味。通过5个月的酒泥接触陈酿，赋予酒体更丰富的层次与质感。
zh.wine-white_castillo: 这款干型白葡萄酒采用卡萨布兰卡谷优质葡萄园的霞多丽酿造。该地区受太平洋影响，气候凉爽清新，使葡萄缓慢成熟，从而形成更优雅细腻的风味。
zh.region-white_castillo: 智利·阿空加瓜·卡萨布兰卡谷
zh.vodka-description: 如果不是在20世纪20年代（或许得益于俄罗斯移民的影响）逐渐进入巴黎的波西米亚社交圈，随后风靡伦敦与纽约，伏特加或许仍只是东欧的区域性饮品。除超高端款外，我们将伏特加储存在-8°C的冷冻环境中，以保持其纯净而几乎难以察觉的细腻风味。
zh.spirit-grey_goose: 这款经过五次蒸馏净化的伏特加，其核心特色在于采用来自法国干邑产区的天然泉水。
zh.spirit-beluga: 其特色包括在配方中使用麦芽、草莓提取物与糖蜜，并通过棉质过滤系统进行独特净化，带来细腻柔和的口感与一丝海风气息，同时拥有45天的“静置”熟成期。
zh.spirit-absolut: 自1879年开始生产，这款伏特加坚持使用纯天然原料：冬小麦与自流井水，不添加糖分。
zh.spirit-finlandia: 以其卓越的纯净度与顺滑口感著称，采用冰川水、六棱大麦，并经过连续50小时蒸馏（超过200道净化工序）。
zh.spirit-bulbash: 以柔和顺滑、口感纯净著称，采用天然原料（麦芽、蔓越莓、松露）及自流井水酿造。
zh.spirit-monkey: 以使用47种草本植物为特色，酒精度为47%。采用陶土容器陈酿，风味独特，融合杜松子、香料与越橘的气息。
zh.spirit-hendricks: 采用独特工艺酿造，加入保加利亚玫瑰与比利时黄瓜精华，风味清新而优雅。
zh.spirit-botanist: 酿造过程中除9种经典植物原料外，还使用22种当地手工采摘的草本、花卉与浆果。
zh.spirit-ukiyo: 以大麦（或米）蒸馏酒为基底，加入柚子皮、杜松子与香料酿造而成。
zh.spirit-bombay: 采用独特的 Vapour Infusion 蒸汽萃取蒸馏法，并选用10种精选植物原料（botanicals）。
zh.spirit-gordons: 全球最受欢迎的伦敦干型金酒之一，自1769年起按照始终不变的秘方酿造。
zh.tequila-title: 龙舌兰 & 梅斯卡尔酒
zh.spirit-don_julio: 为纪念酒厂于1942年创立而打造。这款龙舌兰酒在波本桶中陈酿至少2.5年，呈金琥珀色，口感复杂，带有焦糖、巧克力与橡木风味。其修长高瓶身设计象征龙舌兰叶片。
zh.spirit-patron: 采用小批量双重蒸馏工艺酿造，不经橡木桶陈酿，保留在石炉中烘烤后的龙舌兰纯净风味。每瓶均为手工制作并单独编号。
zh.spirit-herencia: 采用生长8至13年的蓝色龙舌兰酿造，口感层次丰富，带有香草与焦糖的甜美气息，以及辛香肉桂的点缀。
zh.spirit-olmeca: 以清新的柑橘与草本风味为特色，不经陈酿，使其成为调制鸡尾酒及搭配盐与青柠的理想之选。
zh.category-olmeca: 混合型（至少51%蓝色龙舌兰蒸馏物）
zh.spirit-contraluz: 这是一款创新型透明梅斯卡尔，融合龙舌兰的烟熏气息与柔和花香。采用100% Espadin龙舌兰酿造，经橡木桶陈酿后以活性炭过滤去除色泽，同时保留其复杂的风味层次。
zh.spirit-matusalem: Matusalem 的创始人率先采用索莱拉（Solera）陈酿系统来熟成朗姆酒——这也是其风味独特性的关键之一。这一古老工艺同样用于西班牙白兰地和雪利酒的生产，通过不断混合新酒与陈年酒，使口感更加圆润复杂。
zh.region-matusalem: 多米尼加共和国·蒙特普拉塔
zh.spirit-dictador: 以甘蔗为原料酿造，风味浓郁，带有焦糖、咖啡、香草与蜂蜜气息，在柔顺口感中融合陈年木质风味。
zh.spirit-havana_seven: 高端古巴朗姆酒，风味丰富，带有焦糖、可可、香草、成熟热带水果以及淡淡烟草气息。
zh.region-havana_seven: 古巴·圣克鲁斯-德尔诺特
zh.spirit-havana_three: 至少在白橡木桶中陈酿3年，酒液呈浅稻草色，口感柔和，带有香草、焦糖、梨子与香蕉风味，并伴有淡淡烟熏气息。
zh.region-havana_three: 古巴·圣克鲁斯-德尔诺特
zh.spirit-captain: 以甘蔗糖蜜为原料酿造，在波本橡木桶中陈酿两年。香气浓郁，带有香草、香料、焦糖与干果气息，口感平衡顺滑。
zh.spirit-bacardi: 金色朗姆酒，于1862年创立于古巴，在炭烤橡木桶中陈酿。口感柔和均衡，带有香草、烘烤杏仁与香蕉风味。
zh.spirit-macallan_18: 采用美国橡木桶与欧洲雪莉橡木桶双重陈酿工艺，口感均衡而丰富，带有干果、姜、香草与太妃糖风味。琥珀色酒体未使用人工色素。
zh.spirit-macallan_15: 核心特色为美国橡木桶与欧洲雪莉桶双重陈酿，形成和谐复杂的风味，带有干果、香草、香料与柑橘气息，酒精度43%。
zh.spirit-macallan_12: 采用美国橡木雪莉桶与欧洲橡木雪莉桶组合陈酿，口感柔和平衡，带有奶油太妃糖、干果、橙皮与香料风味。酒体呈金琥珀色，余味温暖悠长。
zh.spirit-glen_quinta: 先在波本桶中陈酿10年，随后在多家酒庄的 Ruby 波特酒桶中进行终段熟成。酒体呈深蜂蜜粉色，风味浓郁，带有黑薄荷巧克力、核桃与橙香气息。
zh.spirit-glen_nectar: 这是一款精致的单一麦芽威士忌，最终在法国甜白葡萄酒 Sauternes 酒桶中熟成。风味带有蜂蜜甜香、柑橘、焦糖布蕾与姜香，同时未经过冷滤处理。
zh.spirit-glen_original: 以其柔和口感、果香与花香著称. 其核心特点是采用苏格兰最高的蒸馏器(超过5米), 确保酿造出极为轻盈细腻的酒液.
zh.spirit-balvenie: 独特之处在于陈酿工艺: 先在波本桶中熟成14年, 再转入加勒比朗姆酒桶收尾. 这一过程赋予酒液突出的热带水果风味(香蕉, 菠萝), 香草与焦糖气息, 带来奶油般顺滑温和的口感.
zh.spirit-glen_18: 因在欧罗索雪莉桶与波本桶中陈酿18年而闻名的高端威士忌. 具有层次丰富的平衡口感, 带有烤苹果, 肉桂, 干果与橡木风味, 采用小批量生产.
zh.spirit-glen_15: 关键特色是索莱拉系统融合工艺. 在波本桶, 雪莉桶与新橡木桶中熟成15年后, 于永不半空的巨型橡木槽中调和, 形成浓郁蜂蜜辛香风味.
zh.spirit-octomore: 限量版发行, 桶装强度高达59.8%, 采用100%苏格兰Concerto大麦, 仅使用美国波本桶(金宾, 天堂山, 水牛足迹, 杰克丹尼)陈酿.
zh.spirit-charlotte: 主要特征为高酚含量(约40ppm), 鲜明的烟熏特质与果香优雅并存, 全程岛内陈酿且保持天然本色(未经过滤与添加色素).
zh.spirit-bruichladdich: 虽产自艾雷岛却无泥煤烟熏味, 具有油润质地与明亮的谷物特征, 伴随柑橘, 蜂蜜与海风气息.
zh.spirit-laphroaig: 来自艾雷岛的标志性强劲单一麦芽威士忌, 以极致烟熏, 泥煤与「药香」风味(碘酒, 绷带, 海藻)著称.
zh.spirit-jura: 在波本桶陈酿12年后转入欧罗索雪莉桶收尾. 拥有温和奶油质感, 带有烟熏, 香料, 柑橘与黑巧克力风味, 堪称平衡的烟熏威士忌入门之选.
zh.spirit-talisker: 以强烈的「海洋」特质, 浓重烟熏泥煤气息与独特胡椒余韵闻名. 在美国橡木桶中至少熟成10年, 呈现明亮金色, 带有海盐, 柑橘与干果风味.
zh.spirit-tullamore: 稀有的爱尔兰高端单一麦芽威士忌, 历经18年陈酿并在四种橡木桶(波本, 雪莉, 波特, 马德拉)中收尾. 口感柔滑如天鹅绒, 带有焦糖, 香料与水果风味, 余韵焦糖化.
zh.spirit-nikka: 日本威士忌之父的遗产, 蕴含香料, 橡木, 杏子, 苹果与太妃糖香气. 口感中香草, 太妃糖, 橡木, 杏子, 葡萄干与薰衣草风味和谐交织. 严格遵循苏格兰传统工艺在北海道生产.
zh.spirit-m_shoulder: 这是三种单一麦芽威士忌（Glenfiddich, Balvenie, Kininvie）的混合酒，经波本桶陈酿，带有温和的香草柑橘风味，其标志性的瓶身设计上有三只铜猴，是重要的辨识特征。
zh.spirit-j_d_single: 优质单桶威士忌，与标准的Old No.7不同之处在于每瓶酒都有其独特个性，酒精度更高，口感深邃，带有焦糖橡木风味，并经过双重碳过滤。每瓶酒均标注了桶号及装瓶日期。
zh.spirit-j_d_old: 其主要特点是在陈酿前采用独特的3米糖枫木炭过滤工艺（炭柔化），赋予酒液特别的顺滑口感。
zh.spirit-makers: 来自肯塔基的高端美国波本威士忌，以使用冬麦替代黑麦为特色，赋予其特别的柔和、甜美及奶油般口感。主要特点包括手工制作（小批量生产）、45%酒精度以及独特的红色火漆封瓶，使每瓶酒都独一无二。
zh.spirit-j_b_bourbon: 全球最畅销的肯塔基波本威士忌，以其温和平衡的口感著称，带有焦糖香草风味、辛香气息，并强制在新烧焦的橡木桶中陈酿至少4年。
zh.spirit-j_b_rye: 采用1795年原始配方酿造，在新烧白橡木桶中陈酿4年，带来丰富圆润的口感，蕴含焦糖果香余韵及干爽回味。
zh.spirit-chivas_25: 超高端苏格兰调和威士忌，以浓郁的果仁巧克力风味及奢华瓶身设计著称。这是最负盛名的苏格兰威士忌之一，专为餐后饮用打造。
zh.spirit-chivas_21: 为庆祝1953年伊丽莎白二世加冕而创。其核心特点包括最低21年酒龄、富含坚果烟熏雪莉酒风味的醇厚口感，以及象征女王皇冠宝石的独特瓷制醒酒器（蓝宝石、红宝石、祖母绿款）。
zh.spirit-chivas_18: 以天鹅绒般质地、深邃琥珀色泽及复杂的干邑风味闻名，蕴含干果、太妃糖、黑巧克力气息与轻盈烟熏尾韵。
zh.spirit-chivas_12: 其特点是口感极为柔和，蜂蜜与果香风味平衡。调配以斯佩塞产区的威士忌（尤其是斯特拉塞斯拉）为基础，赋予其丰富的太妃糖、香草、榛果和石楠花香气。
zh.spirit-j_w_blue: 主要特点包括使用极为陈年（最高达60年）且稀有的酒液，每万桶中仅精选一桶，口感温和复杂，带有烟熏、巧克力和干果的香气，每瓶酒均标有独立编号以确保真伪。
zh.spirit-j_w_platinum: 具有浓郁深邃的口感，融合了水果、香草、坚果的香气以及轻盈的烟熏余韵，完美结合了斯佩塞产区特色与尊尼获加经典风格。
zh.spirit-j_w_gold: 采用15种不同麦芽与谷物威士忌调配而成。口感丰富深邃，带有水果、香草、坚果的香气及轻盈烟熏余韵，兼具斯佩塞风土特质与尊尼获加经典风格。
zh.spirit-j_w_double: 此款调和威士忌区别于经典黑标之处在于，因使用重度烘烤橡木桶陈酿及岛屿产区酒液，其烟熏风味更为浓郁。
zh.spirit-dewars: 生产过程中的主要特色是采用「二次陈酿」工艺，即在调配后将混合酒液再次入桶熟成，赋予酒体独特柔顺口感。
zh.spirit-tullamore_blended: 在波本桶与雪莉桶中陈酿3至7年。通过三重蒸馏与桶陈工艺，造就其柔和顺滑的口感。
zh.spirit-jameson: 与苏格兰威士忌不同，詹姆森几乎不带烟熏气息，因其麦芽采用封闭式烘炉干燥。酒液以发芽与未发芽大麦混合为原料，经波本桶与雪莉桶陈酿。
zh.spirit-bushmills: 世界最古老持牌蒸馏厂（自1608年获得许可），核心特色为三重蒸馏工艺赋予威士忌非凡柔顺度，且主要使用麦芽威士忌原酒。
zh.spirit-hennessy_xo: 由莫里斯·轩尼诗于1870年为至亲好友小范围酿制。干邑中含有家族窖藏的老酒。此后约80年间，轩尼诗始终是该等级干邑的唯一生产商，H.O.之名几乎成为轩尼诗的同义词，至今仍是其骄傲所在。葡萄藤纹饰的曲线醒酒瓶造型直至1947年才成为「轩尼诗」X.O的标志性特征。
zh.spirit-hennessy_vsop: 1817年，轩尼诗家族收到来自时任英国摄政王及未来国王乔治四世的一份订单，要求制作一款「极优陈年淡色干邑白兰地」，即色泽浅淡且品质卓越的陈年干邑。由此诞生了V.S.O.P.（Very Superior Old Pale）干邑，其名称直接体现了其独特属性与长期陈酿的特点。
zh.region-hennessy_vsop: 法国. 夏朗德省. 干邑
zh.spirit-hennessy_vs: 这款干邑由干邑地区最佳葡萄种植区的超过40种生命之水调配而成，堪称干邑品质标杆。其诞生历史可追溯至1865年，当时家族创始人曾孙莫里斯·轩尼诗决定引入星标符号标注干邑陈酿年限。传说这一灵感源自他办公室窗把手上的星形装饰。由此诞生了最初以三星符号标注、后定名为V.S.的干邑。
zh.region-hennessy_vs: 法国. 夏朗德省. 干邑
zh.spirit-remy_martin_xo: 属于特优香槟区干邑的顶级酒款，由350-400种陈年10至37年的生命之水调配而成，其中85%以上源自大香槟区与小香槟区。其核心特色是如天鹅绒般顺滑的饱满口感，伴随无花果、茉莉与肉桂的馥郁香气。
zh.region-remy_martin_xo: 法国. 夏朗德省. 干邑
zh.spirit-remy_martin_vsop: 作为法国获奖最多的干邑，自1715年延续生产至今。采用大香槟区葡萄酿制，确保酒液卓越品质。三代调配大师薪火相传，以精湛技艺铸就这款贵族杰作。
zh.region-remy_martin_vsop: 法国. 夏朗德省. 干邑
zh.spirit-marquis: 核心特质为深邃琥珀色泽，蕴含西梅干、香草与香料的复合香气，以及细腻的果味口感。
zh.spirit-coquerel: 完美融合新鲜果香与浓郁木调风味，呈现烤苹果、香草与香料的复杂平衡口感。
zh.spirit-godet: 这款淡色白兰地的核心特色是通过特殊过滤工艺实现的晶莹色泽。为纪念南极探险而创，建议冰镇至4-6°C饮用。
zh.region-godet: 法国. 夏朗德省. 干邑
zh.spirit-ararat_ten: 这款陈年亚美尼亚白兰地以深邃琥珀色著称，口感浓郁饱满，带有西梅干、蜂蜡与核桃的复合风味。
zh.spirit-ararat_ani: 特色在于浓郁的琥珀色泽，强劲口感中带有怡人甜味，悠长的辛香余韵，并采用本土葡萄品种酿制。
zh.spirit-metaxa: 希腊顶级白兰地，独特融合葡萄酒蒸馏液、爱琴海岛屿麝香葡萄酒，以及地中海草本与玫瑰花瓣的秘制萃取物。
zh.spirit-baijiu: 被誉为中国 国酒 的标志性饮品，采用陶坛陈酿，赋予其柔和、多层次的口感，带有坚果与烟熏的香气。
zh.spirit-grappa: 它融合了明亮的清新感、果香调与香脂气息，经橡木桶陈酿后呈现出高贵的琥珀色，带有香草风味和温和口感。
zh.spirit-absinthe: 复兴的经典酒款，拥有200余年历史，以纯正口感、高酒精度和天然翡翠绿色泽著称。
zh.spirit-baileys: 核心工艺在于创造天然鲜奶油与三重蒸馏爱尔兰威士忌的独特稳定乳化液，不含防腐剂可保持2年不酸败或分层。这是全球首款融合细腻口感与17%酒精度的奶油利口酒。
zh.spirit-drambuie: 酒精度40%的优质苏格兰利口酒，特色在于融合陈年单一麦芽威士忌、石楠花蜂蜜、香料和草本植物。
zh.spirit-j_d_fire: 最大特点是具有爆炸性的辛辣肉桂风味与焦糖香调，完美带来温热感。通过著名的枫木炭过滤工艺酿制。
zh.spirit-italicus: 采用卡拉布里亚佛手柑和西西里香橼，呈现清新花香柑橘调，带有薰衣草气息与微妙的辛香苦韵。
zh.spirit-sambuca: 酿造过程中使用中国八角茴香，形成强烈而清新的口感，与甜味完美平衡。
zh.pornstar-description: 我们以一系列艳星鸡尾酒邀您开启美食之旅：从热带百香果到精致的柚子，丝滑桃肉与异域荔枝，每款饮品都在闪耀的普洛赛克气泡酒与轻盈的鹰嘴豆水泡沫衬托下，展现独特的风味二重奏。
zh.masterpieces-p_s_classic: 让艳星马天尼带您沉浸热带风情：温和特调香草伏特加与百香果二重奏，点缀青柠酸爽、低敏蛋白与轻盈普洛赛克气泡。
zh.masterpieces-p_s_yuzu: 金酒与柚子果泥的柑橘深邃完美交融，特调茉莉糖浆的微妙芬芳与柠檬汁的清新交织。鹰嘴豆水的轻盈质地与普洛赛克气泡共同勾勒出无瑕余韵。
zh.masterpieces-p_s_peach: 轻盈朗姆酒激发蜜桃的细腻风味，青柠汁的精致酸度点睛之笔，鹰嘴豆水泡沫与普洛赛克气泡为鸡尾酒注入灵动欢愉。
zh.masterpieces-p_s_lychee: 龙舌兰与丝滑荔枝果泥的绝妙组合，辅以精致龙舌兰花蜜，青柠酸爽、鹰嘴豆水泡沫与普洛赛克气泡共同缔造口感与风味的独特平衡。
zh.martinis-description: 鸡尾酒美学的巅峰之作。从严谨的干马天尼到复杂的马丁内斯，每杯饮品都彰显调酒师技艺与风味组合的深度。细节之处尽显优雅。
zh.masterpieces-dirty_martini: 为大胆组合鉴赏家打造：柔和伏特加与干味美思因辛辣橄榄汁焕发新格调。平衡口感中跃动轻盈咸鲜与精妙深度。
zh.masterpieces-dry_martini: 极简与优雅的典范。金酒与干味美思的纯粹二重奏：摒弃冗余，唯有无可挑剔的和谐与贵族般的克制。经典主义者的不二之选。
zh.masterpieces-lucien: 苦甜交织的精致平衡。金酒与干味美思邂逅金巴利的贵族苦韵，三重 sec 的柑橘甜香画龙点睛。层次复杂的风味，余韵绵长。
zh.masterpieces-martinez: 金酒与红味美思构筑醇厚基底，马拉斯奇诺利口酒的樱桃香调与安格斯特拉苦精的辛香深度相得益彰。复杂调酒鉴赏家的上乘之选。
zh.masterpieces-perfect_martini: 金酒完美平衡干型与红味美思，安格斯特拉苦精的微妙气息点睛。层次分明的圆润口感，风味渐次绽放。
zh.masterpieces-vesper_martini: 承载传奇历史的经典之作。「摇匀，非搅拌」成为其标志性宣言。原料的精妙组合呈现特殊质地——纯净剔透，丝滑无瑕。
zh.gin_tonic-description: 承载航海冒险精神：诞生自英国水手抗疟疾配方，如今以五款精致变奏呈现，每款金酒都为饮品赋予独特个性。
zh.masterpieces-monkey_based: 德国猴王47金酒、怡泉汤力水与多汁柠檬（酸爽青柠/新鲜黄瓜）任选搭配。
zh.masterpieces-ukiyo_based: 一款由日本浮世绘柚子金酒、Schweppes汤力水及您选择新鲜柠檬（酸橙/新鲜黄瓜）调制而成的组合。
zh.masterpieces-botanist_based: 以植物学家苏格兰金酒、Schweppes汤力水及您选择新鲜柠檬（酸橙/新鲜黄瓜）精心调配的组合。
zh.masterpieces-hendricks_based: 选用亨德里克苏格兰金酒、Schweppes汤力水及您偏好新鲜柠檬（酸橙/新鲜黄瓜）融合而成的佳酿。
zh.masterpieces-bombay_based: 由孟买蓝宝石英式金酒、Schweppes汤力水搭配您挑选新鲜柠檬（酸橙/新鲜黄瓜）构成的独特风味。
zh.masterpieces-gordons_based: 哥顿苏格兰金酒与Schweppes汤力水、您钟爱新鲜柠檬（酸橙/新鲜黄瓜）共同演绎的经典组合。
zh.layered-description: 五款遵循酒吧物理学原理创作的明亮组合：原料密度形成完美分界，风味碰撞带来难忘体验。但凡事皆有例外，不是吗？
zh.masterpieces-b53: 苦艾酒、奶油利口酒与咖啡利口酒
zh.masterpieces-ps: 预调特制香草伏特加、百香果与青柠汁混合液
zh.masterpieces-silver_bullet: 银标龙舌兰、柠檬果肉、咖啡利口酒
zh.masterpieces-xxo: 黑朗姆酒、青柠汁与泡泡糖风味
zh.single_malt-description: 真正鉴赏家的选择，他们欣赏个性与口感的深度。每一啜都展现出多层次的风味：从果香的新鲜到木质的深邃，再到辛香的层次。
zh.blended_malt-description: 高贵的麦芽威士忌调和酒体现了传统与现代融合的艺术。它们以精妙的平衡和悠长难忘的余味著称。
zh.american_whiskies-description: 沉浸在美式工艺的氛围中，体验威士忌系列。每一口都透露出经过数十年橡木桶陈酿打磨出的深邃风味。
zh.blended_whiskies-description: 高贵的调和酒是调酒大师辛勤工作的成果。他们融合数十种酒精，为您带来风味与香气无可挑剔的平衡。
zh.brandies-description: 白兰地系列是酿酒师工艺与风土丰富的体现。从干邑的精致香调到雅文邑的独特个性，每一款饮品都讲述着自己独特的味觉故事。
zh.baijiu-description: 精致的白酒体现了中国蒸馏的传统。每一口都展现出谷物香调与精炼烈度的复杂和谐。
zh.grappa-description: 沉浸在阳光明媚的意大利氛围中，品味高贵的格拉巴酒。这款遵循古老配方酿制的饮品，将以深邃的香气和丝滑口感令您着迷。
zh.liqueur-description: 为真正鉴赏家准备的精致系列。从神秘的苦艾魔法到细腻的水果与浆果香调，每一啜都是一次发现。
zh.porto-description: 产自葡萄牙心脏地带杜罗河谷的优质加强型葡萄酒。其丰富、多层次的口感和香气，是酿酒师精湛技艺与独特风土条件的结晶。理想地作为餐后酒或搭配美味甜点。
zh.jerez-description: 安达卢西亚数世纪传统的体现。克里姆雪利酒以其天鹅绒般的质感以及焦糖与坚果香气的和谐而迷人，而佩德罗—希梅内斯甜雪利酒则以其深邃和包裹性的甜味征服味蕾。它们非常适合作为餐后酒或搭配美味甜点。
zh.gin-description: 金酒的历史始于17世纪的荷兰（作为荷兰金酒），并在18世纪的英国蓬勃发展。严格的质量标准（例如，禁止向伦敦干金酒中添加糖分）以及历史悠久的配方，保证了每一口金酒的真实性。
zh.tequila-description: 特基拉和梅斯卡尔酒就像墨西哥的风景：从哈利斯科州阳光明媚的平原到瓦哈卡州的山谷。想象一下正午阳光下蓝色的龙舌兰种植园，或是梅斯卡尔酒师用来烘焙龙舌兰芯的地下土灶——所有这些神奇都凝聚在杯中。
zh.rum-description: 精心挑选的朗姆酒系列，致敬了甘蔗蒸馏酒的丰厚遗产。感受陈年朗姆酒的温热，带有太妃糖和干果的香气，或享受清澈白朗姆酒的明亮清爽。每一瓶酒都是一个关于阳光岛屿的故事，凝聚着蒸馏大师的长期经验。
